gaps: No test covers the scenario where placing the primary earbud back into the charge case and closing the lid fails to update the connection status in the Poly Studio Mobile app (earbud remains shown as connected with charging icon).
No test covers the specific earbud removal order (left first, right second) and subsequent re-insertion of one earbud to verify connection state transitions on the Home screen.
No test covers the Voyager Free 60+ charge case lid state transitions (open/close) and their effect on earbud connection status displayed in the app.
No test covers the scenario where one earbud is in the case (charging) while the other is out, and the app incorrectly shows the in-case earbud as still connected.
No test covers the Home screen device connection status icon accuracy after partial earbud insertion into the charge case (one earbud in case, one out).

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-001: Primary earbud placed in case with lid closed — verify connection status updates to disconnected in app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected (green checkmark or connected icon for Voyager Free 60+).
Remove the left earbud (primary) from your ears.
Place the left earbud into the charge case.
Close the charge case lid completely.
Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app for up to 10 seconds.
Open the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen again for up to 10 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: After placing the left (primary) earbud in the case and closing the lid, the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen updates within 10 seconds to show the left earbud as disconnected (not connected, no charging icon). The right earbud remains shown as connected. After opening the lid, the left earbud re-appears as connected within 10 seconds.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-002: Both earbuds placed in case with lid closed — verify app shows both disconnected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Remove both earbuds from your ears.
Place the left earbud (primary) into the charge case.
Place the right earbud (secondary) into the charge case.
Close the charge case lid completely.
Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app for up to 15 seconds.
Open the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen again for up to 15 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: After placing both earbuds in the case and closing the lid, the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen updates within 15 seconds to show both earbuds as disconnected (no charging icon, no connected status). After opening the lid, both earbuds re-appear as connected within 15 seconds.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-003: Left earbud removed first, then re-inserted while right remains out — verify connection state transitions
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Remove the left earbud (primary) from the charge case first, then remove the right earbud (secondary).
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Place only the left earbud (primary) back into the charge case — do NOT close the lid.
Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app for up to 10 seconds.
Close the charge case lid with only the left earbud inside.
Observe the Home screen for up to 10 seconds.
Open the charge case lid.
Remove the left earbud from the case.
Observe the Home screen for up to 10 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 5-6: With the left earbud in the case and lid open, the app shows the left earbud as connected (charging icon may appear). Step 7-8: After closing the lid, the app updates within 10 seconds to show the left earbud as disconnected. The right earbud remains connected throughout. Step 9-10: After opening the lid, the left earbud re-appears as connected within 10 seconds. Step 11: After removing the left earbud from the case, it remains connected.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-004: Right earbud removed first, then re-inserted while left remains out — verify connection state transitions
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Remove the right earbud (secondary) from the charge case first, then remove the left earbud (primary).
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Place only the right earbud (secondary) back into the charge case — do NOT close the lid.
Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app for up to 10 seconds.
Close the charge case lid with only the right earbud inside.
Observe the Home screen for up to 10 seconds.
Open the charge case lid.
Remove the right earbud from the case.
Observe the Home screen for up to 10 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 5-6: With the right earbud in the case and lid open, the app shows the right earbud as connected (charging icon may appear). Step 7-8: After closing the lid, the app updates within 10 seconds to show the right earbud as disconnected. The left earbud remains connected throughout. Step 9-10: After opening the lid, the right earbud re-appears as connected within 10 seconds. Step 11: After removing the right earbud from the case, it remains connected.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-005: One earbud in case (charging) while other is out — verify app does NOT show in-case earbud as connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Remove the left earbud (primary) from your ears.
Place the left earbud into the charge case.
Close the charge case lid.
Verify the left earbud is now shown as disconnected on the Home screen.
Remove the right earbud (secondary) from your ears and keep it in your hand (do not place in case).
Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app for up to 10 seconds.
Open the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen for up to 10 seconds.
Place the right earbud into the charge case next to the left earbud.
Close the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen for up to 10 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 6: Left earbud shows as disconnected (not connected, no charging icon). Step 7-8: Right earbud remains connected on the Home screen. The left earbud stays disconnected. Step 9-10: After opening the lid, the left earbud re-appears as connected. Step 11-13: After placing the right earbud in the case and closing the lid, both earbuds show as disconnected within 10 seconds.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-006: Rapid lid open/close cycles while earbuds are in case — verify connection status accuracy
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Place both earbuds into the charge case.
Close the charge case lid.
Wait for the app to show both earbuds as disconnected (up to 15 seconds).
Open the charge case lid.
Immediately close the charge case lid within 2 seconds.
Observe the Home screen for up to 15 seconds.
Open the charge case lid again.
Observe the Home screen for up to 15 seconds.
Repeat steps 6-10 two more times (total of 3 rapid open/close cycles).
generated_testcases.expected: After each rapid open/close cycle, the app correctly reflects the final lid state: when lid is closed, both earbuds show as disconnected; when lid is open, both earbuds show as connected. No stale connection state persists. No charging icon appears for disconnected earbuds.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-007: App force-kill while earbuds in case with lid closed — verify connection state on relaunch
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Remove both earbuds from your ears.
Place both earbuds into the charge case.
Close the charge case lid.
Wait for the app to show both earbuds as disconnected (up to 15 seconds).
Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from recent apps).
Wait 5 seconds.
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the Home screen for up to 15 seconds.
Open the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen for up to 15 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 10: On relaunch with lid closed, the Home screen shows both earbuds as disconnected (no stale connected state). Step 11-12: After opening the lid, both earbuds re-appear as connected within 15 seconds.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-008: Bluetooth disconnect while one earbud is in case with lid closed — verify app connection status
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Remove the left earbud (primary) from your ears.
Place the left earbud into the charge case.
Close the charge case lid.
Verify the left earbud shows as disconnected on the Home screen.
From the phone's Bluetooth settings, disconnect or unpair the Voyager Free 60+ device.
Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app for up to 15 seconds.
From the phone's Bluetooth settings, reconnect to the Voyager Free 60+ device.
Observe the Home screen for up to 15 seconds.
Open the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen for up to 15 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 8: After Bluetooth disconnect, the app shows both earbuds as disconnected. Step 9-10: After Bluetooth reconnect, the right earbud (out of case) reconnects and shows as connected; the left earbud (in case with lid closed) remains disconnected. Step 11-12: After opening the lid, the left earbud re-appears as connected within 15 seconds.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-009: Earbud removed from case while lid is closed — verify app shows correct connection state
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Place both earbuds into the charge case.
Close the charge case lid.
Wait for the app to show both earbuds as disconnected (up to 15 seconds).
Open the charge case lid.
Remove only the left earbud (primary) from the case.
Close the charge case lid (right earbud remains inside).
Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app for up to 10 seconds.
Open the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen for up to 10 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 9: After removing the left earbud and closing the lid with the right earbud inside, the app shows the left earbud as connected and the right earbud as disconnected within 10 seconds. Step 10-11: After opening the lid, the right earbud re-appears as connected within 10 seconds.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-CONN-010: Charge case battery critically low — verify earbud connection status accuracy when placed in case
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
Ensure the Voyager Free 60+ charge case battery is at a critically low level (below 5%).
Remove the left earbud (primary) from your ears.
Place the left earbud into the charge case.
Close the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app for up to 20 seconds.
Open the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen for up to 20 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Even with critically low charge case battery, the app correctly updates the connection status: after placing the left earbud in the case and closing the lid, the left earbud shows as disconnected within 20 seconds. After opening the lid, the left earbud re-appears as connected. No stale connected state or incorrect charging icon is displayed.
